tasks.subject: Task 1: Inline threshold editor in cell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When the user clicks a threshold-bearing sensor value (RH/eCO₂/VOC), the input + ✓ + ✕ controls render inside that cell, replacing the value text. The previous below-grid editor block is gone; the leftover-error toast still renders below the grid.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html` (CSS `.thresh-edit-inline`, `thresholdCell` ~528–541, `thresholdEditor` ~545–576)
- Modify: `tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts` (~lines 788–800 — rewrite the "set alert ≥" test for in-cell placement)
- Regenerate: `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png`, `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Clicking `[data-action="edit-threshold"]` replaces the cell's value text with input + save/cancel buttons inside the same `.sensor-cell`.
- The cell's `.sensor-label` remains visible above the inline controls.
- The "set alert ≥" prefix label no longer appears anywhere.
- Per-card error toasts still render below the sensor grid.
- Enter/Escape and ✓/✕ continue to save/cancel; auto-focus on render works.
- Polling re-render preserves the open editor.
- Stale snapshot or in-flight write disables input + buttons.
- `just check` passes.
- `just test-ui` passes.
- Screenshots regenerated and committed.

**Verify:** `just check && just test-ui` → all green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html", "tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Inline editor renders inside .sensor-cell with label still visible", "'set alert ≥' label no longer appears anywhere", "Error toasts still render below the sensor grid", "Enter/Escape and ✓/✕ save/cancel; auto-focus works", "Polling re-render preserves the open editor", "Stale or in-flight disables input + buttons", "just check passes", "just test-ui passes", "Screenshots regenerated"]}
```
